{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Spirit-trap
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A spirit-trap uses a scripted mirror to imprison [[Remnants]] and [[sacred beasts]] using their own [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
